SEARCH

Uses of Enum Class
com.nib.commons.io.OpenMode

Packages that use OpenMode
Package
Description
com.nib.commons
Common utilities and core runtime components for the NIB application framework.
com.nib.commons.io
Provides core Input/Output (I/O) components and abstractions for handling various file organizations and access methods.
com.nib.commons.io.catalog
Provides catalog management mechanisms for I/O operations.
com.nib.commons.io.vsam
Provides classes and interfaces for emulating VSAM (Virtual Storage Access Method) file organizations.

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description

    AbstractFile.openMode
    Represents the mode in which a file is opened.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    Retrieves the OpenMode corresponding to the given integer value.

    Methods in com.nib.commons.io with parameters of type OpenMode
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractFile.open(OpenMode openMode)
    Opens a file with the specified open mode and a default lock mode of Shared.
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractFile.open(OpenMode openMode, LockMode lockMode)
    Opens a file with the specified open and lock modes.
    void
    ISequentialAPI.open(OpenMode openMode, LockMode lockMode)
    Opens a resource with the specified open mode and lock mode.
    FileIOResponse
    SequentialFile.open(OpenMode openMode)
    Opens the file in the specified open mode, delegating to the open(OpenMode, LockMode) method with a shared lock mode.
    FileIOResponse
    SequentialFile.open(OpenMode openMode, LockMode lockMode)
    Opens the file with the specified open mode and lock mode, initializing the I/O API accordingly.

    Method
    Description

    AbstractEntrySequentialFile.open(OpenMode openMode, LockMode lockMode)
    Opens the file with the specified access and lock modes, initializing any required resources and verifying the file organization and VSAM organization of the underlying file.
